'''zajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadpan|deadpan]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadpan|deadpan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zajate|zajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zajatesher|zajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zajatesherĂ«m|zajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zajatero|zajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zajateshĂ«|zajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zajateshĂ«m|zajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizajatero|gokizajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizajateshĂ«|gokizajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizajateshĂ«m|gokizajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozajankerom|gozajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozajankeshĂ«|gozajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozajankeshĂ«m|gozajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozajankeya|gozajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zajaterom|zajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zajatemu|zajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zajateya|zajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizajaterom|gokizajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizajatemu|gokizajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizajateya|gokizajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zajajate|zajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zajajatesher|zajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zajajatesherĂ«m|zajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zajajatero|zajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zajajateshĂ«|zajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zajajateshĂ«m|zajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizajajatero|gokizajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizajajateshĂ«|gokizajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizajajateshĂ«m|gokizajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozajajankerom|gozajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozajajankeshĂ«|gozajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozajajankeshĂ«m|gozajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozajajankeya|gozajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zajajaterom|zajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zajajatemu|zajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zajajateya|zajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizajajaterom|gokizajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizajajatemu|gokizajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizajajateya|gokizajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠjĂŠte|zĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠjĂŠtesher|zĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠjĂŠtero|zĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠjĂŠtero|gokizĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠjĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠjĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠjĂŠterom|zĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠjĂŠtemu|zĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠjĂŠteya|zĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠjĂŠterom|gokizĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠjĂŠteya|gokizĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafjafte|zafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafjaftesher|zafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafjaftesherĂ«m|zafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafjaftero|zafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafjafteshĂ«|zafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafjafteshĂ«m|zafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafjaftero|gokizafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafjafteshĂ«|gokizafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafjafteshĂ«m|gokizafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafjafnkerom|gozafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafjafnkeshĂ«|gozafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafjafnkeshĂ«m|gozafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafjafnkeya|gozafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafjafterom|zafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafjaftemu|zafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafjafteya|zafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafjafterom|gokizafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafjaftemu|gokizafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafjafteya|gokizafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
